calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And Award Of Monetary Sanctions.
The court grants plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery and imposes a monetary sanction against defendant of $640 payable to plaintiff. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, not reported.

Notice And Moiton For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditor Trade Association's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver, And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. 610/PS Not reported.
